news.t: MBS ETFs: Rally Rolls on After Record-Setting Year
The Schwab Mortgage-Backed Securities ETF (SMBS) Starts Trading

overview.description: The Schwab Mortgage-Backed Securities ETF (SMBS) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Bloomberg US MBS - Float Adjusted index. The fund tracks a market value-weighted index of investment grade US mortgage-backed securities. SMBS was launched on Nov 19, 2024 and is issued by Charles Schwab.

data.title: MBS ETFs: Rally Rolls on After Record-Setting Year
data.text: Agency mortgage-backed securities (MBS) are quietly coming off their best year since 2002 — climbing over 8.5%. So far, the macroeconomic backdrop of 2026 suggests last year's rally was far from a flu...

data.title: The Schwab Mortgage-Backed Securities ETF (SMBS) Starts Trading
